Professional Lab Technician

Reliable lab support with a focus on precision, safety, and efficiency.

Get in Touch

Services

Practical, detail-oriented support for research and diagnostics.

  • Sample Preparation

    Accurate preparation and labeling to maintain sample integrity.

  • Equipment Maintenance

    Routine checks and cleaning for calibrated, reliable instruments.

  • Data Logging

    Structured recording to ensure traceable, reproducible results.

  • Safety Compliance

    Adherence to protocols and standards for a safe workspace.

Contact

Have a question or need support? Send a quick message below.

© Lab Technician Services

Lab Technician Landing Page

A minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. The page is responsive, uses a red/black/white color scheme, includes a hero with title and subtitle, a brief services list, and a contact form that shows an alert on submit (no backend).

Features
- Single HTML page
- Responsive mobile-first layout
- Hero section with title and subtitle
- Services list
- Contact form (name, email, message) that triggers an alert on submit
- Only red (#ff0000), black (#000), and white (#fff) colors used

Getting Started
1) Open index.html in your browser.
2) Optionally serve via any static server if desired (not required).

Testing
- Requires Node.js
- Install dev dependencies and run tests:

  npm install
  npm test

Project Structure
- index.html: Single-page markup
- styles.css: Mobile-first responsive styles (red/black/white only)
- script.js: Handles contact form alert
- tests/index.test.js: Jest test to verify the hero title exists

notes: Open index.html directly in a browser to view the page.
Run tests with npm install && npm test.
